cases.name: 制造任务列表打开和基础查询
cases.evidence: Browser page smoke and API/layout smoke passed without visible, network, console, page, or request errors.
cases.nextAction: Capture list query XHR and map it to Controller/Mapper/table in business-production audit.

cases.name: 新建生产工单或制造任务
cases.evidence: Route smoke only. No marker-based create action has been executed yet.
issues: Need business seed data, create endpoint, target table, and required field list.
cases.nextAction: Create ADP_E2E marker work order through UI, capture request, then query PostgreSQL.

cases.name: 工单下发、暂停、恢复、关闭
cases.evidence: Route smoke only. No state transition has been executed yet.
issues: Need status enum, button permission, and workflow preconditions.
cases.nextAction: Use a marker work order and verify status columns before and after each transition.

cases.name: 制造指令单生成或维护
cases.evidence: Manufacturing instruction tab has been observed in UI, but the exact write action and backend table are not mapped.
issues: Need exact route, form fields, and persistence table.
cases.nextAction: Open manufacturing instruction entry, capture network calls, and add route smoke target if stable.

cases.name: 工序、人员、班组派工
cases.evidence: TeamInfo pages are smoke-tested, but production dispatch action has not been mapped.
issues: Need team, position, staff, and dispatch target record seed data.
cases.nextAction: Map dispatch button/action from production task page and verify assigned staff/team columns.

cases.name: 批量配方列表打开

cases.name: 批量配方导入模板下载和 Excel 导入
cases.evidence: Static RM patch exposes downloadXls and importMainXls endpoints, but no real file import has been executed.
issues: Need real template, upload payload, and target table mapping.
cases.nextAction: Download template, import marker row, verify recipe rows in PostgreSQL.

cases.name: 批量配方编辑和删除
cases.evidence: Static RM patch exposes delete endpoint, but no marker recipe has been created and deleted.
issues: Need marker recipe creation path before delete can be safely tested.
cases.nextAction: Create marker recipe, edit it, delete it, and verify soft/hard delete semantics.
